heading: Cemeteries
label: 460lll–28 Cemeteries
notes: Amendments2022— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 117–328
amendments: Amendments2022— designated existing provisions as subsec. (a), inserted heading, and added subsec. (b).Pub. L. 117–328

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall maintain an inventory of and ensure access to cemeteries within the Recreation Area for purposes of burial, visitation, and maintenance.

children.heading: Land for plots for qualified residents or relatives
children.label: b Land for plots for qualified residents or relatives

children.heading: Requests
children.label: 1 Requests
children.text: The Secretary, on request from a qualified resident or relative or a cemetery association, shall grant additional land for the minor expansion of existing cemeteries within the Recreation Area, to the extent necessary, to allow for the burial of qualified residents or relatives.

children.heading: Expenses
children.label: 2 Expenses
children.text: Any expenses required to move border fences or markers due to an expansion under paragraph (1) shall be the responsibility of the person making the request under that paragraph.
